title: secretx-gcp-sm: implement GCP Secret Manager backend
description: Implement SecretStore for GCP Secret Manager. URI: secretx://gcp-sm/<project-id>/<secret-name>. get() calls AccessSecretVersion for the latest version. put() calls AddSecretVersion. refresh() fetches latest bypassing cache. Credential chain via Application Default Credentials (GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS, metadata server, gcloud CLI). Dep: secretx-core, google-cloud-secretmanager.
